Document:
# GLUTTON-CLASS SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
[color=#a4885c]IFF Console:[/color] Yes
[color=#a4885c]Expeditions:[/color] No
"A syndicate vessel meant to provide resipte for the operatives in their long hours of sabotaging Nanotrasen."
# Piloting
[textlink="Piloting" link="Piloting"/]
[textlink="Sector Topology" link="SectorTopology"/]
# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As an Operative Commander of a Syndicate vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
